# Asaptic Labs — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org
# Updated: 2026-05-19

## About

Asaptic Labs is a research and operating company building AI agents at three crossings where decisions are irreversible: quantum security, embodied hardware, and physical-world human care. We work where wrong agent actions cannot be undone and trust must be earned through demonstrated accountability.

## Thesis

AI agents are moving from answering questions to taking actions — signing mandates, routing care decisions, controlling physical systems. At each of these action surfaces, a wrong decision is not a redo. Three crossings define where the hard work is:

× Post-quantum security. Agents sign, authenticate, and delegate. Every signature today uses cryptography that quantum computing will render breakable on a known timetable. The trust layer — identity envelopes, delegation chains, audit logs — must survive that transition. Asaptic builds the post-quantum primitives that agent identity and irreversible financial authorisations will require.

× Hardware. Agents that perceive and act in the physical world — drones, mobile robots, field systems — close the perception-decision-actuation loop under real physical consequence. A wrong command is not a correctable output; it is a physical event. Asaptic works at this crossing with reversibility accounting, calibrated escalation, and hard safety constraints baked in from day one.

× Physical-world human care. The highest-stakes agent deployments are in regulated human domains — eldercare, clinical-adjacent workflows, learning environments — where access is gated by relationships and regulators, and where every wrong decision touches a person. The dataset that matters is built only by being inside the room. Asaptic operates in these environments, building the override-labeling and human-in-the-loop architecture that turns live supervised decisions into compounding ground truth.

## Public essays

- Why the moat in AI is the override log — https://asaptic.com/blog/override-log-as-moat.html
- What the quantum transition means for agent identity — https://asaptic.com/blog/quantum-agent-identity.html
- Why physical-world care is the hardest crossing — https://asaptic.com/blog/physical-care-hardest-crossing.html

## Engage

Asaptic Labs is selectively open to partners, mentors, advisors, talented builders, and those who can open access to regulated environments, institutional compute, standards bodies, or networks that take years to enter through conventional channels. We are not currently raising capital.

Contact: engage@asaptic.com
Engage page: https://asaptic.com/engage.html

## Brand

Name: Asaptic Labs
Domain: https://asaptic.com
Scope: AI agents at the crossings of quantum security, embodied hardware, and physical-world human care
Region: Asia-based, global scope
Byline: Asaptic Labs (no individual attributed)
